#   ____  _             _       
#  |  _ \| |_   _  __ _(_)_ __  
#  | |_) | | | | |/ _` | | '_ \ 
#  |  __/| | |_| | (_| | | | | |
#  |_|   |_|\__,_|\__, |_|_| |_|
#                 |___/         
# A Template for Hdf5Plugin, a Sink Plugin
# Generated by the command: plugin --type sink --dir hdf5_plugin --install-dir /Users/p4010/usr/local HDF5
# Hostname: Fram-IV-2.local
# Current working directory: /Users/p4010/Develop/MADS_plugins
# Creation date: 2025-07-09T12:52:15.976+0200
# NOTICE: MADS Version 1.3.1
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.28)
set(CMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM 3.5)
# Get the latest git tag or default to 0.1.0
execute_process(
  COMMAND git describe --tags --abbrev=0
  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
  OUTPUT_VARIABLE GIT_VERSION
  OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE
  ERROR_QUIET
)
if(GIT_VERSION MATCHES "^v")
  string(SUBSTRING "${GIT_VERSION}" 1 -1 GIT_VERSION)
endif()
if(NOT GIT_VERSION MATCHES "^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?(\\.[0-9]+)?(\\.[0-9]+)?$")
  set(GIT_VERSION "0.1.0")
  message(STATUS "Using default version: ${GIT_VERSION}")
else()
  message(STATUS "Using Git tag version: ${GIT_VERSION}")
endif()

project(hdf5 VERSION ${GIT_VERSION} LANGUAGES CXX)
if(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "")
  set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE "Release" CACHE STRING "Choose the type of build." FORCE)
endif()
if(CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX_INITIALIZED_TO_DEFAULT)
  execute_process(
    COMMAND mads -p
    OUTPUT_VARIABLE MADS_PREFIX
    OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE
    ERROR_QUIET
  )
  if(MADS_PREFIX)
    set(CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX "${MADS_PREFIX}" CACHE PATH "Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories." FORCE)
  endif()
endif()
message(STATUS "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE: ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}")
message(STATUS "CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX: ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}")
set(PLUGIN_SUFFIX "" CACHE STRING "Suffix for the plugin file, identifying the architecture, e.g. arm64, x86_64, etc.")
if(PLUGIN_SUFFIX STREQUAL "")
  message(WARNING "No PLUGIN_SUFFIX set, using default plugin name. In multi-platform environment with OTA plugins it is advised to set PLUGIN_SUFFIX to the architecture, e.g. arm64, x86_64, etc.")
else()
  message(STATUS "PLUGIN_SUFFIX set to: ${PLUGIN_SUFFIX}")
endif()

# PROJECT SETTINGS #############################################################
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)
set(SRC_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src)

if(UNIX AND NOT APPLE)
  set(LINUX TRUE)
  add_compile_options(-fPIC)
endif()

# CHANGES ADDED 2026-03-27 ####################################################
# Keep all test-related CMake additions isolated in this block.
option(HDF5_PLUGIN_BUILD_TESTING "Enable tests for the hdf5 plugin" ON)
if(HDF5_PLUGIN_BUILD_TESTING)
  enable_testing()
endif()

function(hdf5_plugin_disable_dependency_testing)
  set(BUILD_TESTING OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
  set(JSON_BuildTests OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
  set(H5EX_BUILD_TESTING OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
endfunction()

function(hdf5_plugin_register_ctest test_target)
  if(NOT HDF5_PLUGIN_BUILD_TESTING)
    return()
  endif()

  if(APPLE)
    set(hdf5_writer_test_target ${test_target})
  else()
    set(hdf5_writer_test_target ${test_target}_main)
  endif()

  add_test(
    NAME hdf5_writer_unit_tests
    COMMAND $<TARGET_FILE:${hdf5_writer_test_target}>
  )
  set_tests_properties(hdf5_writer_unit_tests PROPERTIES
    WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
  )
endfunction()
# END CHANGES ADDED 2026-03-27 ################################################

# DEPENDENCIES #################################################################
include(FetchContent)
# pugg is for the plugin system
FetchContent_Declare(pugg 
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/pbosetti/pugg.git
  GIT_TAG        1.1.0
  GIT_SHALLOW    TRUE
  GIT_PROGRESS   TRUE
  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL
)

hdf5_plugin_disable_dependency_testing()
FetchContent_Declare(json
  URL https://github.com/nlohmann/json/releases/download/v3.11.3/json.tar.xz
  DOWNLOAD_EXTRACT_TIMESTAMP TRUE
)


set(H5EX_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(H5EX_BUILD_HL OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(HDF5_BUILD_CPP_LIB ON CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(HDF5_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(HDF5_BUILD_TOOLS OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(HDF5_BUILD_UTILS OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(HDF5_ENABLE_SZIP_ENCODING OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(HDF5_ENABLE_SZIP_SUPPORT OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(HDF5_GENERATE_HEADERS ON CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(HDF5_ENABLE_Z_LIB_SUPPORT OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")
FetchContent_Declare(hdf5
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/HDFGroup/hdf5.git
  GIT_TAG        hdf5_1.14.6
  GIT_SHALLOW    TRUE
  GIT_PROGRESS   TRUE
  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL
)

FetchContent_MakeAvailable(pugg json hdf5)

FetchContent_Populate(plugin 
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/pbosetti/mads_plugin.git
  GIT_TAG        v2.3-P7
  GIT_SHALLOW    TRUE
  SUBBUILD_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/_deps/plugin-subbuild
  SOURCE_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/_deps/plugin-src
  BINARY_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/_deps/plugin-build
)

include_directories(${plugin_SOURCE_DIR}/src)
include_directories(${HDF5_CPP_SOURCE_DIR}/src)
include_directories(${HDF5_SOURCE_DIR}/src)
include_directories(${HDF5_SOURCE_DIR}/src/H5FDsubfiling)
include_directories(${HDF5_SRC_BINARY_DIR})
if (WIN32)
  link_directories(${HDF5_CPP_SRC_BINARY_DIR}/Release)
  link_directories(${HDF5_SRC_BINARY_DIR}/Release)
  else() 
  link_directories(${HDF5_SRC_BINARY_DIR})
  link_directories(${HDF5_CPP_SRC_BINARY_DIR})
endif()

# MACROS #######################################################################
# Call: add_plugin(name [SRCS src1 src2 ...] [LIBS lib1 lib2 ...])
#       the source file ${SRC_DIR}/plugin/<name>.cpp is implicitly added
macro(add_plugin name)
  # on MacOS only, plugins can be compiled as executables
  set(multiValueArgs LIBS SRCS)
  cmake_parse_arguments(plugin "" "" "${multiValueArgs}" ${ARGN})
  if (APPLE)
    add_executable(${name} ${SRC_DIR}/${name}.cpp ${plugin_SRCS})
    set_target_properties(${name} PROPERTIES ENABLE_EXPORTS TRUE)
    set(${name}_EXEC ${name}.plugin)
  else()
    add_library(${name} SHARED ${SRC_DIR}/${name}.cpp ${plugin_SRCS})
    add_executable(${name}_main ${SRC_DIR}/${name}.cpp ${plugin_SRCS})
    target_link_libraries(${name}_main PRIVATE pugg ${plugin_LIBS})
    set_target_properties(${name}_main PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME ${name})
    set(${name}_EXEC ${name})
    list(APPEND TARGET_LIST ${name}_main)
  endif()
  target_link_libraries(${name} PRIVATE pugg ${plugin_LIBS})
  set_target_properties(${name} PROPERTIES PREFIX "")
  if (PLUGIN_SUFFIX)
    set_target_properties(${name} PROPERTIES SUFFIX "_${PLUGIN_SUFFIX}.plugin")
    target_compile_definitions(${name} PRIVATE PLUGIN_NAME="${name}_${PLUGIN_SUFFIX}")
  else()
    set_target_properties(${name} PROPERTIES SUFFIX ".plugin")
    target_compile_definitions(${name} PRIVATE PLUGIN_NAME="${name}")
  endif()
  list(APPEND TARGET_LIST ${name})
endmacro()


# BUILD SETTINGS ###############################################################
if (APPLE)
  set(CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH "@executable_path/../lib")
  include_directories(/opt/homebrew/include)
  link_directories(/opt/homebrew/lib)
else()
  set(CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH "\$ORIGIN/../lib;/usr/local/lib")
endif()
include_directories(${json_SOURCE_DIR}/include)

# These plugins are always build and use for testing
set(HDF5_PLUGIN_LIBS hdf5_cpp-static hdf5-static)
if (WIN32)
  list(APPEND HDF5_PLUGIN_LIBS shlwapi ws2_32)
endif()
add_plugin(hdf5_writer LIBS ${HDF5_PLUGIN_LIBS})
hdf5_plugin_register_ctest(hdf5_writer)

# INSTALL ######################################################################
if(APPLE)
  install(TARGETS ${TARGET_LIST}
    LIBRARY DESTINATION lib
    RUNTIME DESTINATION lib
    ARCHIVE DESTINATION lib
  )
else()
  install(TARGETS ${TARGET_LIST}
    LIBRARY DESTINATION lib
    RUNTIME DESTINATION bin
    ARCHIVE DESTINATION lib
  )
endif()


# PACKAGE #######################################################################
string(TOLOWER "${CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME}" PACKAGE_OS_NAME)
if(APPLE AND CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES)
  list(LENGTH CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES PACKAGE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES_COUNT)
  if(PACKAGE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES_COUNT GREATER 1)
    set(PACKAGE_ARCH_NAME "universal")
  else()
    set(PACKAGE_ARCH_NAME "${CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES}")
  endif()
else()
  set(PACKAGE_ARCH_NAME "${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR}")
endif()
if(PACKAGE_ARCH_NAME STREQUAL "")
  set(PACKAGE_ARCH_NAME "${CMAKE_HOST_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR}")
endif()
if(PACKAGE_ARCH_NAME STREQUAL "")
  set(PACKAGE_ARCH_NAME "unknown")
endif()
string(TOLOWER "${PACKAGE_ARCH_NAME}" PACKAGE_ARCH_NAME)

set(CPACK_GENERATOR "ZIP")
set(CPACK_PACKAGE_NAME "${PROJECT_NAME}")
set(CPACK_PACKAGE_VENDOR "MADS")
set(CPACK_PACKAGE_VERSION "${PROJECT_VERSION}")
set(CPACK_INCLUDE_TOPLEVEL_DIRECTORY ON)
set(CPACK_PACKAGE_FILE_NAME
  "${CPACK_PACKAGE_NAME}-${CPACK_PACKAGE_VERSION}-${PACKAGE_OS_NAME}-${PACKAGE_ARCH_NAME}")
include(CPack)
